debug_info.goal:
rec :
  (P Q : Prop) →
    (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) →
      ((hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp)) →
        ((hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) → (h : Disjunction P Q) → motive h
comp_left :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hp : P),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.left P Q hp) = h_left hp
comp_right :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hq : Q),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.right P Q hq) = h_right hq
⊢ False

proof:
let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : ∀ hp : True, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ hq : True, motive (right hq) := fun _ => false
  have e1 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = true := comp_left True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have e2 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = false := comp_right True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [this] at e1
  rw [e2] at e1
  cases e1
verification_message: Proof verified successfully

    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq α
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at *
    obtain ⟨hl_bound, hr_bound, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv_mem⟩ := h
    by_cases hv : v = label
    · simp [hv, beq_iff_eq]
      cases hv_mem <;> simp [*]
    · simp [beq_iff_eq, hv]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihl hl_ord]
        constructor
        · intro; assumption
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl h => exact h
          | inr h =>
            have : v ≤ label := hr_bound label h
            omega
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihr hr_ord]
        constructor
        · intro; assumption
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl h =>
            have : label ≤ v := hl_bound label h
            omega
          | inr h => exact h
